    Index

    A C D E G H I L M O P R S T 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    P

    peekTableTop() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Deck
    Returns the card currently on top of the table pile (the last one played), without removing it.
    placeOnTable(Card) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Deck
    Places a card onto the table pile (marks it as location 2).
    playCard(int, int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Plays the card at the given hand index.
    playCard(Card) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameController
    Ejecuta la jugada de una carta por parte del humano y, si la jugada fue válida, notifica al TurnManager para que programe a la máquina siguiente en caso de que le corresponda el turno.
    playCard(Card, int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Plays a specific card instance from this player's hand.
    Player - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Abstract base class representing a participant in a Cincuentazo game.
    Player(String) - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Constructs a new player with the given name.
    PlayerHand - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Represents the set of cards currently held by one player.
    PlayerHand() - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.PlayerHand
    Constructs an empty PlayerHand.
